items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Mini Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 New Size🆕 Soft Calfskin Puzzle Handbag
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 New Size🆕 Soft Calfskin Puzzle Handbag
🌟 Loewe's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This version is made of soft calfskin, featuring overlapping edges🌟Shoulder or crossbody*Handheld or top handle*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*External zip pocket at the back and two internal slip pockets*Zip closure, leather pull tab*Suede lining with Anagram embossing.
size:062433
Model:33*14.7*21.5cm

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
🆕 Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This small version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM All steel hardware

specs.rawTitle:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
🆕 Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This small version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM All steel hardware

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
*Three carrying ways* Short handle, detachable shoulder, and crossbody strap
*Zipper with two leather pulls*
*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic closure*
*Flat pocket inside*
*D-ring on the left for customization*
*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot stamping or silver stamping, Double L embossed brand logo🌟
size:24.5*10*18.5CM
Model:262552

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
Model: 012406
Size: 32*17*24CM
